facts: A web service is exposed on 10.10.10.5:80 with Apache 2.4.58 banner data.
hypotheses: A minimal header or fingerprinting check should confirm whether the service exposes more useful metadata.
network_summary.focus: Prefer the smallest approved HTTP validation before broader web scanning.

observations: The service is grouped as 80 tcp/http Apache 2.4.58 on host 10.10.10.5.

hypotheses.title: HTTP fingerprinting may reveal framework or proxy clues.
evidence: Apache banner data present in scan output.
hypotheses.rationale: Banner-backed services usually benefit from a small fingerprinting pass first.

cve_interpretation.note: Treat this as a lead only; version matching is not proof of exposure.
